name: nejm-skills
description: NEJM-style medical research skills plus preserved Nature/CNS-style academic skills.

interface.shortDescription: NEJM-style medical research and preserved Nature/CNS workflows
interface.longDescription: Use NEJM Skills for patient-oriented medical literature search, PubMed-grounded citations, medical manuscript writing and polishing, figures and tables, data availability statements, reviewer responses, paper readers, and paper-to-PPTX decks. The original Nature/CNS-style skills remain bundled.
defaultPrompt: Find PubMed-grounded medical references for this claim.
Create an NEJM-style appraisal reader for this paper.
Draft an NEJM-style medical manuscript discussion.
